error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Invalid media type for Instagram post
symptom: When attempting to post an image to Instagram using the Facebook Graph API, an error occurs stating 'Bad request - please check your parameters. Only photo or video can be accepted as media type.'
applies_when: Using Facebook Graph API to post to Instagram
Image URL is from Google Drive
not_this_if: Image is uploaded as binary data
Using a direct image file link
root_cause: The Facebook Graph API requires that media types be either photo or video. If the provided media URL is not a direct link to an image file, the API cannot process it correctly, resulting in a bad request error.
fix_steps: Change the Facebook node settings to enable 'Send Binary File'.
Use the binary data from the previous node instead of a URL for the image.
Ensure the caption is passed correctly in the request.
agent_instruction: Switch to sending the image as binary data in the Facebook node settings.
